description: This SAS program tracks medication usage patterns for patients. It uses RETAIN to maintain running totals of opioid pills and antibiotic courses across patient visits. It creates lag variables to track prior values and identify trends in medication usage, flagging patients with rapid increases in opioid prescriptions or frequent antibiotic usage.
